name: Peak Design Travel Duffle 65L
description: The Travel Duffelpack 65L in black from Peak Design is a duffel-style bag with an ID card holder that has a top made from 100% recycled 600D nylon canvas and a 900D ottoman-weave polyester fabric bottom.

features.Key Features:: 100% Recycled 600D Nylon Canvas Shell | Padded Hand Straps with Magnetic Clasp | Removable Shoulder Strap | Holds 4 Packing/Photo Cubes | Oversized #10 Weatherproof Zipper | Theft-Deterrent Zipper Pulls | Use Hand Straps to Wear as Backpack | 2 Interior and 4 Exterior Pockets
features.What’s in the box?: Peak Design Travel Duffel (Black, 65L) | Padded Shoulder Strap | 2 x Padded Hand Strap | Handle Wrap | Limited Lifetime Warranty
